logs.content: **Hello! 👋**, I'm **Agent Zero**, your AI assistant. How can I help you today?

logs.heading: A0: Loading gchat skill to sync Google Chat conversations

thoughts: The user wants me to load the 'gchat' skill and execute it to fetch Google Chat conversations.
The skill requires Chrome DevTools at 192.168.1.11:9223 with Google Chat in 3-panel view.
I need to wait for completion (5-15 min) without interruption.
On success: use notify-user skill to send a success message.
On failure: use notify-user skill with error summary and priority 4.
kvps.headline: Loading gchat skill to sync Google Chat conversations
